ksa_text: Knowledge of data quality management program design, including profiling methodologies, rule authoring standards, quality threshold setting, issue classification and prioritization, escalation path design, and continuous improvement cycles.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality is a primary or secondary domain for the Data Platform Team Lead. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (team lead).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Quality), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.451). External reviewers may question whether this specific knowledge KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Data Platform Team Lead versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK Data Quality Management chapter and industry surveys confirm data quality competencies for quality-focused leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Data Quality appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Data Platform Team Lead.

decision_rationale: Data Quality knowledge KSA is within scope for the Data Platform Team Lead at the team lead tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
